case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. VS. KENJI HUBBARD et al

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 15, INCL.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT HUBBARD, KENJI DOES 1 THRU 15, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-27-2012
